features.name: parametric module with integer parameter controlling port width
features.description: Code should include a module with an integer parameter that directly controls port bit-widths, declared as a parameter with a default value and referenced in port declarations

features.name: parameter subtraction expression in bit-vector range
features.description: Code should include a port or signal declaration whose bit-vector range uses a parameter arithmetic subtraction expression of the form [w-1:0], where w is a module parameter

features.name: parametric port passthrough assignment
features.description: Code should include a module that simply passes an input port to an output port where both ports have parameter-dependent widths, testing identity assignments under parametric width contexts
